How is the comment misleading? It doesn't seem good to me. Have you considered HSM restore?

parents.subject: LU-5398 ldlm: handle NULL lock in ldlm_handle_enqueue0()

commit.subject: LU-4053 clio: don't cache inode of unlinked files
commit.message:
LU-4053 clio: don't cache inode of unlinked files

If file is known to be destroyed, the inode on the client side
shouldn't be cached on the client side. MDT uses OBD_MD_FLREMOVED
flag in various RPC reply to tell client this information.

Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie53101f856d9f7cf4e922f2a5b5216eb5b92474d
